projects.title: Locker Room UI
projects.description: A team locker system with a liquid-glass UIStroke effect, concave inner-corner rounding via duplicate-and-clip masking, and a mouse-driven camera pan for browsing gear.

projects.title: What Is Your IQ?
projects.description: A full quiz game with four UI pages, a 20-question auto-advancing flow, a purchasable countdown timer, developer products, gamepasses, and DataStore-backed progress saving.

projects.title: Moderation Panel
projects.description: An in-game moderation panel exposing the player data accessible server-side, built for quick action during live sessions.

projects.title: AI Sidebar Plugin
projects.description: A Roblox Studio plugin with an AI chat sidebar and code suggestions, connected to a locally hosted model through a Python relay server and tunnel.

projects.title: Error Scanner Plugin
projects.description: A Studio plugin that scans scripts for syntax issues, performance problems, deprecated APIs, and obfuscation, with clickable navigation straight to the offending line.

projects.title: Team Selection UI
projects.description: A scrollable 3x2 team-card selection screen paired with server-side round logic.
